chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1582 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.7127/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 04.02.2025 Ms. Rizwana Ismail, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Lasshari, advocate for the respondent. Comprehensive report is filed on behalf of the respondents, which is taken on record. In view thereof, counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition any further and the same is disposed of. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
